items.definition_en: An apple is a round fruit that is usually red, green, or yellow.
items.example_en: I eat an apple every day with my lunch.

items.definition_en: A banana is a long yellow fruit with soft sweet flesh.
items.example_en: He put a banana in his backpack for a snack.

items.definition_en: An orange is a round citrus fruit with a tough orange skin.
items.example_en: She likes to drink orange juice in the morning.

items.definition_en: A pear is a soft sweet fruit that is green or yellow.
items.example_en: I bought a pear at the market today.

items.definition_en: A grape is a small round fruit that grows in bunches.
items.example_en: She picked a grape from the bunch and ate it.

items.definition_en: A strawberry is a small red fruit with tiny seeds on its surface.
items.example_en: We made a strawberry cake for her birthday.

items.definition_en: A lemon is a sour yellow fruit often used in cooking and drinks.
items.example_en: He squeezed a lemon into his tea.

items.definition_en: A peach is a soft juicy fruit with fuzzy skin.
items.example_en: She ate a peach while reading her book.

items.definition_en: A plum is a small round fruit with smooth purple or red skin.
items.example_en: He put a plum in his lunchbox for dessert.

items.definition_en: A melon is a large round fruit with sweet juicy flesh.
items.example_en: We ate cold melon on a hot day.

items.definition_en: A cherry is a small round red fruit with a stone inside.
items.example_en: She put a cherry on top of the ice cream.

items.definition_en: A watermelon is a large green fruit with red juicy flesh and black seeds.
items.example_en: They shared a slice of watermelon at the picnic.

items.definition_en: A pineapple is a tropical fruit with tough skin and sweet yellow flesh.
items.example_en: He brought a pineapple to the family gathering.

items.definition_en: A blueberry is a small round blue fruit that is sweet or sour.
items.example_en: She mixed a handful of blueberries into her yogurt.

items.definition_en: A kiwi is a small brown fruit with green flesh and tiny black seeds.
items.example_en: I like to add sliced kiwi to my salad.

items.definition_en: A raspberry is a small soft red fruit made up of many tiny parts.
items.example_en: He picked a raspberry from the bush and smiled.

items.definition_en: An apricot is a small orange fruit with soft sweet flesh.
items.example_en: She packed a fresh apricot for lunch.

items.definition_en: A lime is a small green citrus fruit that tastes sour.
items.example_en: He put a slice of lime in his drink.

items.definition_en: A grapefruit is a large yellow or pink citrus fruit with a sour taste.
items.example_en: She eats half a grapefruit for breakfast.

items.definition_en: A pomegranate is a round fruit with thick skin and many juicy seeds inside.
items.example_en: He sprinkled pomegranate seeds on his salad.
